mbison-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

mbison-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit
17 frames of advantage added when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

mbison-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
Produces a crumple stun for 32 frames when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Juggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter

mbison-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

mbison-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
notes: 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

mbison-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Forces the opponent into a standing position
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on counter or Punish Counter

mbison-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

mbison-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

mbison-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

mbison-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

psycho-hammer.name: Psycho Hammer
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.
Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit

evil-knee.name: Evil Knee
notes: A knee strike that can be canceled into special moves.

hover-kick.name: Hover Kick
notes: A sliding low attack that cannot be blocked standing.
Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

shadow-hammer.name: Shadow Hammer
notes: A two-hit series of attacks, the second of which cannot be blocked crouching.
Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit

shadow-spear.name: Shadow Spear
notes: An attack consisting of multiple hits that cannot be blocked while standing.

hell-attack.name: Hell Attack
notes: A combination attack that is useful against jumping opponents.
During a jump

psycho-crusher-attack-light.name: Psycho Crusher Attack (Light)
psycho-crusher-attack-light.name_ja: サイコクラッシャーアタック（弱）
notes: A quick charge forward empowered by Psycho Power. It deals a large amount of damage, making it particularly effective in combos.
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 17
Considered airborne from frames 22 - 31

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 17

psycho-crusher-attack-light-psycho-mine.name: [Psycho Mine] Psycho Crusher Attack (Light)
psycho-crusher-attack-light-psycho-mine.name_ja: [サイコマイン付与時] サイコクラッシャーアタック（弱）
notes: A quick charge forward empowered by Psycho Power. It deals a large amount of damage, making it particularly effective in combos.
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 17
Considered airborne from frames 22 - 31
Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

double-knee-press-light.name: Double Knee Press (Light)
notes: Flip and fly forward towards the opponent before hitting them multiple times. A powerful tool to control space at a distance.

double-knee-press-medium.name: Double Knee Press (Medium)
notes: Flip and fly forward towards the opponent before hitting them multiple times. A powerful tool to control space at a distance.

double-knee-press-heavy.name: Double Knee Press (Heavy)
notes: Flip and fly forward towards the opponent before hitting them multiple times. A powerful tool to control space at a distance.

double-knee-press-od.name: Double Knee Press (OD)
notes: Flip and fly forward towards the opponent before hitting them multiple times. A powerful tool to control space at a distance.

backfist-combo-light.name: Backfist Combo (Light)
backfist-combo-light.name_ja: バックフィストコンボ（弱）
notes: Step forward and deliver a backhand blow into a powerful palm thrust. Plants a Psycho Mine on hit.
Implants a Psycho Mine into the opponent on hit

backfist-combo-light-psycho-mine.name: [Psycho Mine] Backfist Combo (Light)
backfist-combo-light-psycho-mine.name_ja: [サイコマイン付与時] バックフィストコンボ（弱）
notes: Step forward and deliver a backhand blow into a powerful palm thrust. Plants a Psycho Mine on hit.
Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

backfist-combo-medium.name_ja: バックフィストコンボ（中）
notes: Step forward and deliver a backhand blow into a powerful palm thrust. Plants a Psycho Mine on hit.

backfist-combo-od.name_ja: バックフィストコンボ（OD）

Adds a floor bounding effect on the final attack

backfist-combo-od-psycho-mine.name: [Psycho Mine] Backfist Combo (OD)

psycho-mine-self-detonation.name: Psycho Mine (Self Detonation)
psycho-mine-self-detonation.name_ja: サイコマイン（自動爆発）

shadow-rise-light.name: Shadow Rise (Light)
notes: A quick and high-reaching jump. Two different follow-ups can be used from it.
Can transition to Head Press and Devil Reverse (including Overdrive versions) from frames 18-46
Is considered airborne from frame 9

shadow-rise-medium.name: Shadow Rise (Medium)
notes: A quick and high-reaching jump. Two different follow-ups can be used from it.
Can transition to Head Press and Devil Reverse (including Overdrive versions) from frames 18-46
Is considered airborne from frame 9

shadow-rise-heavy.name: Shadow Rise (Heavy)
notes: A quick and high-reaching jump. Two different follow-ups can be used from it.
Can transition to Head Press and Devil Reverse (including Overdrive versions) from frames 18-46
Is considered airborne from frame 9

shadow-rise-od.name: Shadow Rise (OD)
notes: A quick and high-reaching jump. Two different follow-ups can be used from it.
Can transition to Overdrive Head Press and Devil’s Reverse from frames 16-42
Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 8
Is considered airborne from frame 9

head-press.name: Head Press
notes: A technique from Shadow Rise that stomps on an opponent below you, and performs another jump if the first hit touches the opponent. Its direction can be controlled after use. It won't consume any additional Drive when used from Overdrive Shadow Rise.
During Shadow Rise
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked
Can transition to Somersault Skull Diver from frame 23 until landing when this attack hits or is blocked.

head-press-od.name: Head Press (OD)
notes: A technique executed from Shadow Rise that stomps on an opponent. When performed from Overdrive Shadow Rise, it does not consume additional Drive gauge.
During Shadow Rise
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked
Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit

head-press-od-shadow-rise.name: Head Press (OD Shadow Rise)
head-press-od-shadow-rise.name_ja: ヘッドプレス（ODシャドウライズ）
notes: During Shadow Rise OD
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked
Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit

somersault-skull-diver.name: Somersault Skull Diver
somersault-skull-diver.name_ja: サマーソルトスカルダイバー
notes: A technique executed from the jump that occurs after Head Press. Will turn towards the enemy when used behind them. Its direction can be controlled back and forth after performing it.
After Head Press

devil-reverse.name: Devil Reverse
notes: A technique that chops at the opponent, executed from Shadow Rise. Its direction can be controlled after use. It won't consume any additional Drive when used from Overdrive Shadow Rise.
During Shadow Rise
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked

devil-reverse-psycho-mine.name: [Psycho Mine] Devil Reverse
devil-reverse-psycho-mine.name_ja: [サイコマイン付与時] デビルリバース
notes: A technique that chops at the opponent, executed from Shadow Rise. Its direction can be controlled after use. It won't consume any additional Drive when used from Overdrive Shadow Rise.
During Shadow Rise
Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked
Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

devil-reverse-od.name: Devil Reverse (OD)
notes: A technique that chops at the opponent, executed from Shadow Rise. Its direction can be controlled after use. It won't consume any additional Drive when used from Overdrive Shadow Rise.
During Shadow Rise

devil-reverse-od-psycho-mine.name: [Psycho Mine] Devil Reverse (OD)
devil-reverse-od-psycho-mine.name_ja: [サイコマイン付与時] デビルリバース（OD）
notes: A technique that chops at the opponent, executed from Shadow Rise. Its direction can be controlled after use. It won't consume any additional Drive when used from Overdrive Shadow Rise.
During Shadow Rise
Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

devil-reverse-od-shadow-rise.name: Devil Reverse (OD Shadow Rise)
devil-reverse-od-shadow-rise.name_ja: デビルリバース（ODシャドウライズ）
notes: During Shadow Rise OD
Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

devil-reverse-od-shadow-rise-psycho-mine.name: [Psycho Mine] Devil Reverse (OD Shadow Rise)
devil-reverse-od-shadow-rise-psycho-mine.name_ja: [サイコマイン付与時] デビルリバース（ODシャドウライズ）
notes: During Shadow Rise OD
Detonates a Psycho Mine on block or on hit

knee-press-nightmare.name: Knee Press Nightmare
knee-press-nightmare.name_ja: ニープレスナイトメア
notes: Take aim at the opponent's legs with a series of crushing blows. Useful as a combo ender, or as a counter attack by making use of its invincibility.
Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 11
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 11

psycho-punisher.name: Psycho Punisher
notes: Launch the opponent into the air with the shockwave from the landing of a powerful jump before following it up with a strong attack. Effective against enemies using projectiles from long range. Its direction can be controlled back and forth after performing it.
Completely invincible on frames 1 - 25
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%

unlimited-psycho-crusher.name: Unlimited Psycho Crusher
unlimited-psycho-crusher.name_ja: アンリミテッドサイコクラッシャー
notes: Rush towards the opponent before smashing them into the ground with devastating strength. A versatile move that can counter projectiles, be used in combos, and can turn the tables when under pressure.
When under 25% vitality
Completely invincible between frames 1 - 15
The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
* Can only be canceled into from special moves

unlimitted-psycho-crusher-ca.name: Unlimitted Psycho Crusher (Critical Art)
unlimitted-psycho-crusher-ca.name_ja: アンリミテッドサイコクラッシャー（CA）
notes: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 15
The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
* Can only be canceled into from special moves

deadly-throw.name: Deadly Throw
notes: When near opponent
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

death-tower.name: Death Tower
notes: When near opponent
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
